summary: Fix learning-gate.mjs to use isGovernedConfigFile() instead of matchPath() when filtering governed changes. matchPath() does not exclude .governance-hashes.json, learning-updates/, or meta-knowledge-index.json — causing hash-refresh-only commits to be falsely rejected as missing a learning update record.

validation.scripts: node scripts/learning-gate.mjs --staged — passes with 'no governed changes detected' for hashes-only staged changes

notes: One-line fix: line 378 changedFiles.filter(matchPath -> isGovernedConfigFile). The isGovernedConfigFile function was already defined and had all correct exclusion logic but was not being used in the main staged-changes flow.
